---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What are you trying to do that the compass doesn't currently support? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references to other games/tools, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
